forbidden_capabilities: model source, GGUF, payload archive or storage credential committed to Git
completed immutable object on second-stream SHA-256 or size mismatch
object deletion, version deletion or retention shortening under the governed prefix
source download, conversion rerun or quantization rerun
model benchmark, admission, activation, deployment or production-readiness claim
acceptance: the second deterministic archive stream is SHA-256 and size verified before CompleteMultipartUpload
a mismatched second stream aborts the incomplete multipart upload before object completion
only one bounded multipart part is materialized locally and the complete archive is never stored
the exact completed conversion report identity and semantic report SHA-256 are authority-bound before S3 mutation
the exact object VersionId is HEAD-verified and RetainUntilDate is at least LastModified plus 90 days within bounded tolerance
the existing exact-VersionId FIFO restore and independent full archive rehash remain mandatory
benchmark remains NOT_RUN, model admission remains NOT_DONE and production_operational_status remains NOT_ATTESTED
